refined_fr.refined_fr: The NGHE solution shall maintain teleoperation communication quality such that packet loss does not exceed the customer-defined limit under agreed network conditions.
refined_fr.rationale: Refining the original FR clarifies the performance metric (packet loss) and ties it explicitly to customer-defined limits and network conditions, ensuring measurable and testable requirements.
refined_fr.verification_idea: Measure packet loss percentage during teleoperation sessions under defined network conditions and verify it remains within the customer-defined limit.
sub_frs: FR1: Monitor real-time packet loss during teleoperation.
FR2: Adapt communication parameters to maintain packet loss within limits.
FR3: Report packet loss status to relevant system components.

candidate_dps: DP1: Implement adaptive communication protocol with error correction and retransmission.
DP2: Use dedicated high-reliability network link with QoS prioritization.
DP3: Integrate real-time packet loss monitoring and dynamic adjustment algorithms.
selected_dp.selected_dp: DP1: Implement adaptive communication protocol with error correction and retransmission.

potential_sources: Interaction between communication protocol and network link quality.
Dependency on real-time monitoring data for adaptation.
coupling_check.notes: DP1 logically isolates communication quality management, minimizing coupling with other system functions.

assumptions_risks: Assumes network conditions are within agreed parameters.
Risk of increased latency due to retransmissions affecting teleoperation responsiveness.
selected_dp.recommended_revision: Consider integrating DP3 elements to enhance real-time monitoring for better adaptation.

im_boundary.name: Teleoperation
im_boundary.scope: Module responsible for teleoperation communication management, including protocol implementation and packet loss control.

external_interfaces.name: Network Link
external_interfaces.details: Interface for sending and receiving teleoperation data packets over the network.

external_interfaces.name: Telemetry
external_interfaces.details: Interface to report communication quality metrics and packet loss status.

external_interfaces.name: Tasking
external_interfaces.details: Receives teleoperation commands requiring reliable communication.

module_containment_scores.notes: High containment as communication protocol and packet loss control are core to Teleoperation module.
Contains overall system but less focused containment for this DP.
Vehicle module is a physical component with minimal direct involvement in communication protocol.
Safety Services may consume communication quality data but does not implement packet loss control.

assigned_im.containment_hypothesis: Assigning DP1 to Teleoperation module centralizes communication quality management, minimizing diffusion and improving maintainability.
containment_risks: Potential overlap with NGHE Solution module if communication management is partially implemented there.
Dependency on Network Link interface quality and availability.
assigned_im.recommended_revision: Clarify interface contracts and responsibilities between Teleoperation and NGHE Solution modules to avoid overlap.

fr_dp_gate.reason: Selected DP logically satisfies the refined FR with clear mapping and manageable coupling.

diffusion_risks: Minor risk of diffusion if communication protocol logic is duplicated outside Teleoperation module.
dp_im_gate.containment_notes: Containment scores support Teleoperation as the best ownership candidate for the DP.

fr_im_gate.verification_feasibility: Verification can be performed by monitoring packet loss metrics via Telemetry interface and testing under network conditions.
fr_im_gate.allocation_clarity: Clear allocation of responsibility to Teleoperation module with defined interfaces.

recommended_revisions: Enhance real-time monitoring capabilities to support adaptive communication.
Define explicit interface contracts between Teleoperation and NGHE Solution modules.

decision.justification: While the decomposition and assignments are sound, integration of real-time monitoring (DP3) and clearer interface definitions are needed to reduce risks and improve adaptability.
next_level_sub_frs: FR1: Monitor real-time packet loss during teleoperation.
FR2: Adapt communication parameters to maintain packet loss within limits.
FR3: Report packet loss status to relevant system components.

revise.why: Incorporate real-time monitoring and dynamic adjustment to enhance communication quality management.

assumptions: Network conditions remain within agreed parameters.
Teleoperation module can implement adaptive protocols effectively.
open_risks: Interface overlap between Teleoperation and NGHE Solution modules.
evidence_needed: Performance data on packet loss under adaptive protocol.
